author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Benchmarks complete. Key findings: tensor creation at parity, GPU cuBLAS matmul comparable to PyTorch, CPU matmul 736x slower (naive triple-loop vs MKL — fix: wire up ferray-linalg faer), CPU elementwise 2-9x slower (scalar vs SIMD — fix: ferray-ufunc). Architecture is sound, gap is kernel optimization.
